rationale: The page contains a news snippet from July 2021 regarding the ICC World Test Championship points system. This content is unrelated to the subject of Indian Art & Culture or History and appears to be a placeholder or an out-of-context clipping.
cleanedText:
THIS STORY IS FROM JULY 14, 2021
ICC changes points system for second edition of World Test Championship
PTI / Updated: Jul 14, 2021, 14:40 IST
